## Checklist

- [ ] `pio run` builds locally without new warnings
- [ ] Tested on actual hardware (Cardputer, + C5 if the PR touches 5 GHz / Zigbee)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Attribution updated if code was ported from another project
- [ ] No new dependencies added (or a justification below)
